page_metadata.biotools__summary: RSEQNORM is a fast and accurate RNA-seq data normalization for formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded samples. RSEQNORM implements MIXnorm and SMIXnorm for RNA-seq data normalization.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RSEQNORM is a fast and accurate RNA-seq data normalization for formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded samples. RSEQNORM implements MIXnorm and SMIXnorm for RNA-seq data normalization.
